transcript.text:
The content of this video includes charity for less-fortunate children in Dongjak-gu and we want to express our gratitude towards FILA Korea for actively participating. FILA Korea sponsored children's puffer jackets as gifts for this activity, and we are pleased to inform you that we were NOT paid advertising and production costs by the above companies . In addition, the apparel worn by Tzuyang and staff were also personally purchased without sponsorship, so again, this video is NOT a paid advertisement.
[To: Santa Claus]
[Childrens' Secret Letter]
[What pops in your mind when you think of 'Christmas'?]
[Santa Claus]
[What is your image of Santa Claus?]
He wears red boots
He wears red clothes
He gives presents to well-behaved children
He has facial hair
He's about this much taller than me
Like this much
[He's as tall as the truck!?]
[I'm tired]
[Addicted to caffeine]
Hey Rudolph!

Why are you wearing Santa's clothes?
Come follow me
[HaDolph X TzuSanta]
[Santa Village's Present Factory]
[Ex-Pro Basketball Player's Free Throw]
[Non-contact Delivery]
[This video was filmed on December 19th (before the group-ban order of 5 or more people), and was taken in compliance with quarantine guidelines]
Hello everyone~
I.. We(?)...
It's Christmas..
For the children...
[3 strikes, you're out!
How many times is it going to take you?
Are we going to film this all day?
1 more time, please
Hello everyone~

We are here for an event for Christmas
Specifically for the 98 children located in Dongjak-gu (city)
To wrap their Christmas gifts
[This video was produced in collaboration with Tzuyang & Ha Seungjin, 'FILA Korea', 'Dongjak-gu Volunteer Center', and 'Korea Central Volunteer Center' to help out children in Dongjak-gu for Christmas]
Tzuyang is the best! She loves children!
People already know me, but
Who are these people?
My editors
And over here,
Part-time workers that will be working at today's restaurant
[Jungwon's Snack Bar will be opening soon]
Will you come to eat? Of course
Even when Tzuyang is not there
To see these 2 ladies?
These 2 said they won't say a word
[Cusses] Are you kidding me?

I'm a grown man with kids wearing a Santa suit
We have to do the initial process to separate the items
[Thank you FILA Korea for donating puffer jackets for the children]
These are the gifts they wanted
We're also putting all these snacks in the gift, right?
I thought this was on display for Tzuyang's mukbang today
How about you show us how it's done?
You just do it
We won't get it done at this rate
I'll put the gift in and give it to you
Since I have long arms
[First one is complete]
That's so pretty They're going to love it
I want to be a kid again so I can receive a gift from Tzuyang
You have a kid, right?
I have 2

What will you get them for Christmas?
My son loves crafting and building stuff
My daughter is 4, so she likes everything I give her
These children will spend a warmer Christmas this year thanks to you
I really hope so!
They certainly will
Anyone here have a pain-relieving patch? I think I'm getting numb
I'm really good at doing stuff with my hands
Do you want to see who can do it faster?
But don't just wing it since these are for children
Yes, do it as neatly as possible and quickly as possible
Finger flick in the forehead as punishment?
That's so not fair for me
I won't go easy on you because you're a girl
Okay, finger flick
Ready, Start!

Don't wrap it lightly!
Oh, wait!
This tape is brand new
[Steals his tape]
Where did this one go?
Our boss is faster!
Boss!? I see how it is now
Boss! Nice~
Finished!
[Oh my.. Finger Flick]
[Time for compliments] You're so good at everything
[Nice try]
Did the editors ever come out in your videos before?
Kind of, sort of
Sit Come here!
Tell us what you would want Tzuyang to improve on

The viewers are curious No!
Just some things that you want to be fixed
She messes up more than 10 times
I did!?
What?
I met her when I barely started streaming (2 months)
Does she eat a lot outside? No, at home
She's always eating something at home (They are living together)
This is okay, right?
Can we have some music going on here?
Instead of music,
I hired these people because they were good at dancing
Really?
Wait, boss!
I got to see this
[Confused workers]

These people should not be working at a snack bar!
They're so good!
That's amazing
I'm hyped up now
Let's go!
Times have changed..
When I was younger, the Rudolphs would wrap the gifts
Now the Santa is doing it
We're actually doing everything?
I can feel the genuinity
But it's not too bad since we're 6
I can't make everything on the menu myself,
but since you guys are hungry I'll bring some spicy rice cake
[Tzuyang is the best!]
I'm looking forward to it
Your mask!

I have a big head
I couldn't sleep last night
How about mine?
Enjoy~ Thank you
The spicy rice cake is good, but I will definitely come back for these noodles
[Wrapped 98 presents for 6 hours]
Now that we finished wrapping and eating,
Can I go home now?
No no
We have to deliver all of this
Then let's go!
[68 to Dongjak-gu Orphanage & 30 to Dongjak-gu's less-fortunate children]
[Cheongwoon Orphanage]
[This video was filmed on December 19th (before the group-ban order of 5 or more people), and was taken in compliance with quarantine guidelines]
An angel came down in a human body
Our future is so bright

They are so precious
How did these young people even think of doing something like this?
As an adult, I am sorry and thankful at the same time
[Non-contact delivery]
Merry Christmas!
[Social distancing gift delivering skills]
[Wow, presents!]
Tzuyang, you're pretty!
That's abundant I'm already full
1 more time
[It's Tzuyang!]
[Girl fans]
I'm good at catching
I'll catch it first
Can you throw it?
Is this possible?

Here's a present from Santa!
[His free throw]
[Success]
I've gained confidence
[Tzuyang's free throw]
Not to me!
Over there!
[Thank you!]
[Stack the gifts under the wishing tree]
We delivered the presents
It would've been better if we got to see their reactions
But we can't do that because of covid
So I'm a little sad about that
But I hope these gifts will brighten up their Christmas
Let's all try to work together to end covid
And I hope we have a better Christmas next year

[This video was produced in collaboration with Tzuyang & Ha Seungjin, 'FILA Korea', 'Dongjak-gu Volunteer Center', and 'Korea Central Volunteer Center' to help out children in Dongjak-gu for Christmas]
[We did a non-contact delivery for those 30 less-fortunate households]
Merry Christmas! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
